stemHtml: The Centre of Gravity of an aeroplane is at 25% of the Mean Aerodynamic Chord. This means that the Centre of Gravity of the aeroplane is situated at 25% of the length of…

options.a: the mean aerodynamic chord in relation to the leading edge.
options.b: the mean aerodynamic chord in relation to the trailing edge.
options.c: the mean aerodynamic chord in relation to the datum.
options.d: the aeroplane in relation to the leading edge.
